subject: A wild, untamed gateway formed from massive twisted trees and jagged stone, lit by clusters of orange lanterns and torches hanging amid the branches. The gate marks the threshold of Gruul territory in Ravnica.
description: A foreboding archway built from the gnarled trunks and branches of enormous trees, fused with rough-hewn stone and earth. Dozens of small orange lanterns and braziers hang from the limbs and ledges, glowing warmly against the dim, twilight forest beyond. The gate's silhouette is craggy and asymmetrical, suggesting overgrown ruins reclaimed by wild forces rather than civic architecture. Faint embers and warm light spill through openings in the canopy, while the surrounding terrain dissolves into shadowy underbrush. The composition is symmetrical and scenic, with no figures present.
foreground: Gnarled tree-trunk gateway laced with stone, hung with orange lanterns and braziers
background: Dim twilight forest with hints of distant fires and shadowed canopy
